note: Submodule of varnish_purger (project varnish_purge). Provides one Purge @PurgeTagsHeader plugin that adds a Cache-Tags response header. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing documented facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: What does the Varnish Purger Tags submodule add to responses and why?
evals.expected_output: It adds a Cache-Tags response header (the page's Drupal cache tags) on cacheable responses so Varnish can BAN cached pages by cache tag.

evals.prompt: Which Purge plugin type and plugin id does varnish_purge_tags provide?
evals.expected_output: A @PurgeTagsHeader plugin with id varnish_tagsheader (class CacheTags), header_name Cache-Tags.

evals.prompt: How do I configure the Varnish Purger Tags submodule?
evals.expected_output: There is nothing to configure — just enable it (drush en varnish_purge_tags). The header name is fixed to Cache-Tags in the plugin.

evals.prompt: Which module does varnish_purge_tags depend on?
evals.expected_output: It depends on the main varnish_purger module.
